name: Turn-based roguelike RPG
description: Have you ever thought about playing a roguelike RPG with any character that exists? In this chat, that works. Choose a team of up to four characters and try to reach the end of the adventure. (You can choose the four team members and the RPG theme, but the characters will be adapted to the RPG style and will receive a class among attacker, tank, support, or buffer. Each character will have a passive ability, a basic attack, one skill, and an ultimate ability.))
creator: Oacorrentado
